visuals.title: Requirements for Public Key Cryptography
visuals.description: Animated diagram showing the six fundamental requirements for public key cryptosystems, the mathematical foundation of one-way trapdoor functions, and the hard problems used by RSA, DH, and ECC.

rows: Easy to encrypt with public key
Easy to decrypt with private key
Infeasible to find private from public key
Infeasible to recover plaintext from ciphertext + public key
